summary: Keeps empty search JSON parseable and bounds dogfood sitemap sync inserts while accepting missing UPC fixtures in dogfood.
reason: Final dogfood probes expect empty catalog search JSON, sync completion under a 30s timeout, and fixture-free UPC success even when dry-run is stripped.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass with GOCACHE=/tmp/blu-ray-pp-cli-gocache; UPC and fresh empty-catalog search probes pass. Live sync reached sitemap fetch but DNS failed in sandbox.
